---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Call '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| VelocityPHP version | e.g. 1.1.0 |
| PHP version | e.g. 8.1 |
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Web server | e.g. Apache 2.4 |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (screenshots, logs, etc.).
